main_failures: The generated model's facial features still retain significant resemblance to the reference person
The construction of the front edge is slightly more structured/hemmed than the raw crochet edge of the reference
evaluation.summary: The garment fidelity is high, particularly in the reproduction of the specific green and pink striped crochet texture. The silhouette correctly captures the ruana-style drape rather than a structured cardigan. The model change is moderate but could be more distinct.
